sections.label: Intro
lines: In the quiet before the dawn,
A whisper stirs the soul,
A promise of a brand-new day,
Where broken hearts are made whole.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In the stillness of the waiting,
Under skies of endless blue,
Hope ignites a burning fire,
And dreams begin to break through.
Every trial, every sorrow,
Transforms into a guiding light,
As the wind lifts every spirit,
Into the arms of endless flight.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: When the weight of the world grows heavy,
And shadows dim the day,
Listen to that gentle calling,
That shows you the way.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But they who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength;
They shall mount up with wings like eagles;
They shall run and not be weary;
They shall walk and not faint.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Step by step, the journey’s calling,
Through valleys deep and high,
Every heartbeat fuels the vision,
Of soaring into the sky.
Let the echoes of resilience
Carry you beyond the night,
Embrace the rising radiance,
That turns darkness into light.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lift your eyes above the tempest,
Feel the power deep inside,
With every breath, you’re reborn anew,
On wings of hope you’ll ride.
The storms may rage, but you remain,
A soul that will not break,
For in the calm after the chaos,
A new strength you will awake.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But they who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength;
They shall mount up with wings like eagles;
They shall run and not be weary;
They shall walk and not faint.

sections.label: Outro
lines: So let your spirit rise and soar,
Beyond the limits of despair,
In every step, find the courage,
To spread your wings out there.
